## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run format:check`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm audit --audit-level=moderate`

## Risk

- [ ] Touches terminal command execution
- [ ] Touches filesystem reads/writes
- [ ] Touches Git operations
- [ ] Touches persistence or settings
- [ ] Documentation or metadata only

## Notes

Add screenshots, recordings, or implementation notes that would help reviewers.
